cases.summary: Booked installation & setup (€890) and went from kickoff to launch in three weeks — roughly three weeks faster than their last hand-coded relaunch, as the team reports it. Zero custom content types written.

image.title: Desiderio hero page in the Lagoon preset
image.alternative: Desiderio frontend hero page rendered in the Lagoon theme preset.
image.description: Screenshot of a Desiderio frontend page from the seeded styleguide.

cases.summary: Shipped a WCAG-minded patient portal on audit-clean templates and built-in dark mode — Lighthouse accessibility hit 96 on launch day. A custom brand preset from the creators (from €1,990) carries the identity.

image.title: Desiderio dark-mode page in the Midnight preset
image.alternative: Desiderio frontend page rendered in the dark Midnight theme preset.
image.description: Screenshot of a Desiderio frontend page from the seeded styleguide.

cases.summary: Rolled out dark mode and a denser layout through site settings alone — OKLCH tokens kept every dashboard readable — then moved to managed hosting at €99/month: updates, daily backups, EU datacenter.
